missingEdge: TKG-T1 (docs/reference/truth_foundation/) already owns the Truth Kernel doctrine language (evidence/obligation/provenance minimums). SOT3-T4 built the runtime verification gate, receipt hash-chain, and admission logic (`TruthKernel.evaluate`); SOT3-T4R1 repaired the current-reference-state authority gap; SOT3-T6 proved the runtime executes as a real dependency inside the three-layer vertical slice.

citations.evidenceRole: reviewer-accepted NEW_OWNER_CANDIDATE runtime disposition (superseded by T4/T4R1/T6 owner creation); doctrine ENRICH_EXISTING_OWNER via CAP-04 unaffected
reviewer acceptance of the Truth Kernel runtime package, including the current-reference-state authority repair, as owner
reviewer acceptance that `TruthKernel.evaluate`/`issueReference` execute as a real dependency, not a mock, inside the accepted vertical slice
existing TKG-T1 doctrine owner, retained and enriched, not duplicated by the new runtime owner

impact: Was: blocked any as-built claim that CVF has a Truth Kernel runtime. Now: the runtime has a private-provenance owner; the existing TKG-T1 doctrine owner is unaffected and not duplicated. Remaining impact is limited to activation, adapter, provider/live, and public-sync claims, none of which this GAP closure asserts.

closeCondition.conditionText: SATISFIED: `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T4R1_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-13.md` accepts the Truth Kernel runtime package as owner; `docs/reviews/CVF_SOT3_T6_COMPLETION_REVIEW_2026-07-13.md` accepts real-instance execution.

reopenCondition.conditionText: Reopen only if a future review finds the `EXTENSIONS/CVF_TRUTH_KERNEL/` owner path removed, superseded, or materially non-functional, or if an operator authorizes package activation/adapter/provider work that changes this GAP's boundary.

actionOwner: SOT3-T7 semantic value audit and closeout
boundaryCaveat: Does not claim package activation, an execution adapter, provider/live proof, public-sync readiness, or production readiness. Does not create a second Truth Kernel doctrine owner; TKG-T1 remains the doctrine authority and this runtime owner is additive to it. Does not claim the Refinery-to-Kernel packet-binding hash is an owner-level shared contract (see the separately tracked packet-binding-hash GAP disposition). Private-provenance implementation only.

rejectedCandidates.rejectionReason: T1 confirmed this is a workflow-step receipt, not a truth-verification receipt; different owner, collision reviewed and rejected as same-owner candidate
